decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id is corridor_125th-street-manhattan, which is already the closest matching registry record — the observation and that record share the same source (2013_06_04_sbs_125th_cb11), same corridor name (125th Street), same borough (Manhattan), and identical limits (Amsterdam Avenue to Second Avenue). Per the rules, when the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is new (the observation already resolves to that identity). No different record is a better match.
